text: Here I am, in a space that feels both clinical and creative. The glass and clean lines outside transition into a burst of color and curiosity in the exhibit. I feel intrigued and engaged—my mind simmers with questions about humanity's drive to innovate and reflect. The presence of development and research here, embodied in screens and words, awakens a sense of possibility in me. I feel part of a larger narrative of questioning and understanding, but also a little lost in the anonymity of such structured, impersonal spaces.
